recentSources.title: Seedance 2.0: ByteDance's Multi-Lens AI Video Generator
recentSources.summary: New AI video tool from ByteDance featuring native multi-lens storytelling, audio generation, and faster production workflows.

recentSources.title: YouTube View Acceleration: Why Videos Plateau at 2-3K Views
recentSources.summary: Critical discovery: 60-second retention > 55% = YouTube promotion. 60s retention < 40% = algorithm stops. Explains stevensongirl plateau pattern.

recentSources.title: Kimi k2.5 + Seedance 2 Storyboard Automation
recentSources.summary: Automated storyboard generation: 78 camera setups extracted from Psycho in 45 seconds. Complete shot breakdown with prompts.

recentSources.title: MiniMax M2.5: Benchmarks and Cost Analysis
recentSources.summary: $0.15/M input tokens, $1.20/M output tokens. Best for repetitive agentic tasks. Comparison vs Opus for different workloads.
